channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak: American oncologist who became cruise ship's de facto head doctor speaks to ABC News - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description:
1. Hantavirus outbreak: American oncologist who became cruise ship's de facto head doctor speaks to ABC News  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  2. The country where lethal hantavirus cases are on the rise. Experts blame climate change  CNN
  3. Tenerife medics poised for arrival of virus-hit cruise ship  BBC
  4. Hantavirus: Current Situation  Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
  5. Passengers on Hantavirus Cruise Ship Will Disembark in Tenerife and Return to Home Countries  The New York Times
item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Russia holds downsized Victory Day parade  Al Jazeera
  2. Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different  BBC

  4. Putin Presides Over Downsized Military Parade as Ukraine War Drags On  WSJ
  5. Is Ukraine Preparing Spiderweb 2.0 on Russia’s Victory Day?  Hungarian Conservative

item.title: Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation - AP News
item.description:
1. Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation  AP News

  3. At the Venice Biennale I saw anger at Russia and Israel – and its leadership pretending everything was fine  The Guardian
  4. Biennale Arte 2026 | Voting Procedures for the Visitors’ Lions  La Biennale di Venezia

item.title: Indonesian rescuers retrieve body from Mount Dukono as search continues - The Guardian
item.description: Indonesian rescuers retrieve body from Mount Dukono as search continues  The GuardianSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News

item.title: Peter Magyar Takes Over as Hungary’s Leader From Viktor Orban - The New York Times

item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces calls to resign after disastrous local elections - CBS News

item.title: Australian far-right party wins first lower house seat - DW.com

item.title: Trump's feuds, tensions with allies likely to outlast Iran war - Reuters
item.description:

item.title: After Frederiksen Falls Short in Denmark, Right-Leaning Politician Is Asked to Form Government - The New York Times

item.title: Russia Ukraine: Putin's fear is showing. There's good reason for it. - Slate
item.description:
1. Russia Ukraine: Putin's fear is showing. There's good reason for it.  Slate

  3. Putin’s Strongman Image Is Fading as Ukraine Brings War Home to Russia  WSJ
  4. Putin’s day of humiliation  The Telegraph
  5. Rumors of Instability in Moscow  The New Yorker
